findings.description: Attribute names `file`, `dir`, `class` appear in the first column of attribute tables but are absent from hints. `file` is a required attribute of both import and config-file elements; `dir` is shared by both; `class` is the required attribute of component. These are searchable terms users would use to look up these elements.
findings.source_evidence: import属性表: `file(必須)`, `dir`; config-file属性表: `file(必須)`, `dir`; component属性表: `class(必須)`
